page_content:
Formerly: HNUH228Z and HONR279L.

BSOS248 Leadership Seminar | (1-6 Credits)

A topics course in the behavioral and social sciences designed to develop student leaders with skills that will address important issues of the college and offers diverse viewpoints intended to challenge common perceptions of leadership, technology programs and communication. Repeatable to: 9 credits.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
